images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese gravure idol, embodying a vintage nostalgic mood on a quiet forest pathway during the blue hour. She wears a form-fitting, traditional Hanfu top with delicate silk embroidery that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, paired with a trendy plaid shirt casually tied around her waist, adding a modern, youthful edge. Her skin texture is flawless yet realistic with visible pores and faint vellus hair, glowing softly in the moody, desaturated light. She stands at eye-level, her index finger gently touching her lips in a gesture of playful secrecy, her large expressive eyes locking onto the lens with a cute yet seductive gaze. The background is a blurred aesthetic of forest greenery bathed in muted, low-saturation tones, creating a dreamy bokeh. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
